ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test (e.g., Dry Braking, Dry Handling) */,
  "test_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the test result among similar tests */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., 36.3 M, 56.2 s) */,
  "best_result" TEXT /* Best result recorded for the test type */,
  "result_difference" TEXT /* Difference between the test result and the best result */,
  "performance_percentage" REAL /* Performance percentage compared to the best result */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the test type */,
  "test_conditions_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the test conditions */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or team who conducted the test */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test result */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test result */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the test result */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the test result is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle */,
  "top_speed" INTEGER /* Top speed of the vehicle */,
  "acceleration_0_to_60" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "braking_distance_60_to_0" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to 0 mph */,
  "handling_rating" REAL /* Handling rating of the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle record was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the vehicle record */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the vehicle record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the vehicle record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type (e.g., Braking, Handling, Straight Line) */,
  "test_metrics" TEXT /* Specific metrics for the test type */,
  "test_units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the test metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test type was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test type */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the test type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the test type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)
